proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age (age_years, continuous) is associated with shorter pfs_months overall (negative slope).
Female sex (sex_female=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than male sex.

analyses.result_summary: Slope of pfs_months on age_years = 0.1759 (p=0); R^2=0.4922.
Mean pfs_months: female=4.686 vs male=4.699; difference=-0.013; p=0.562.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps, ordinal 0/1/2) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Stage IV disease (stage_iv=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-stage IV.
Brain metastases (has_brain_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months than no brain mets.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs stage_iv=1 vs 0: 3.617 vs 5.153; diff=-1.536; p=0.
Mean pfs brain_mets=1 vs 0: 3.750 vs 4.800; diff=-1.050; p=1.45e-178.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Node-positive disease (node_positive=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than node-negative.
Postmenopausal status (postmenopausal=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than premenopausal.
Larger tumor size (tumor_size_cm, continuous) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher Ki-67 proliferation index (ki67_pct, continuous) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs node_pos=1 vs 0: 4.681 vs 4.705; diff=-0.024; p=0.292.
Mean pfs postmen=1 vs 0: 4.684 vs 4.707; diff=-0.023; p=0.311.

proposed_hypotheses.text: ER-positive disease (er_positive=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than ER-negative.
PR-positive disease (pr_positive=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than PR-negative.
HER2-positive disease (her2_positive=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than HER2-negative (without targeted therapy as a univariate effect).
HER2-low disease (her2_low=1) is associated with different pfs_months than HER2-not-low.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs ER+ vs ER-: 4.865 vs 4.297; diff=0.568; p=3.7e-143.
Mean pfs PR+ vs PR-: 4.824 vs 4.462; diff=0.362; p=5.82e-59.
Mean pfs HER2+ vs HER2-: 4.317 vs 4.776; diff=-0.459; p=6.1e-70.
Mean pfs HER2-low vs not: 4.765 vs 4.650; diff=0.114; p=1.04e-06.

proposed_hypotheses.text: BRCA1 mutation (brca1_mutation=1) is associated with different pfs_months than wild-type.
BRCA2 mutation (brca2_mutation=1) is associated with different pfs_months than wild-type.
PIK3CA mutation (pik3ca_mutation=1) is associated with different pfs_months than wild-type.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs BRCA1+ vs BRCA1-: 4.669 vs 4.694; diff=-0.024; p=0.724.
Mean pfs BRCA2+ vs BRCA2-: 4.569 vs 4.696; diff=-0.127; p=0.0813.
Mean pfs PIK3CA+ vs PIK3CA-: 4.328 vs 4.887; diff=-0.559; p=6.07e-144.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher ast_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher alt_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher sodium_meq_l is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher potassium_meq_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher calcium_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (hypercalcemia is unfavorable).
Higher bun_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

In a multivariable OLS adjusting for ECOG, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, crp_mg_l, nlr, hemoglobin_g_dl, ki67_pct, tumor_size_cm, alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, calcium_mg_dl, ECOG remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, albumin_g_dl remains positively associated with pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, weight_loss_pct_6mo remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it (unadjusted main effect).
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it (unadjusted main effect).
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it (unadjusted main effect).
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it (unadjusted main effect).
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it (unadjusted main effect).
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it (unadjusted main effect).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs on treatment_tamoxifen=1 vs 0: 4.723 vs 4.680; diff=0.043; p=0.0769.
Mean pfs on treatment_palbociclib=1 vs 0: 5.408 vs 4.310; diff=1.098; p=0.
Mean pfs on treatment_trastuzumab=1 vs 0: 4.645 vs 4.705; diff=-0.060; p=0.0292.
Mean pfs on treatment_olaparib=1 vs 0: 4.660 vs 4.696; diff=-0.036; p=0.33.
Mean pfs on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 vs 0: 4.686 vs 4.694; diff=-0.007; p=0.846.
Mean pfs on treatment_pembrolizumab=1 vs 0: 4.630 vs 4.704; diff=-0.074; p=0.0175.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusting for prognostic features (ECOG, stage_iv, brain_mets, age, albumin, LDH, weight_loss, CRP, NLR, Hb, Ki67, tumor size, ALP, Ca, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA, node, postmenopausal, sex), treatment_tamoxifen remains independently associated with pfs_months (signed effect).

Adjusting for prognostic features (ECOG, stage_iv, brain_mets, age, albumin, LDH, weight_loss, CRP, NLR, Hb, Ki67, tumor size, ALP, Ca, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA, node, postmenopausal, sex), treatment_palbociclib remains independently associated with pfs_months (signed effect).

Adjusting for prognostic features (ECOG, stage_iv, brain_mets, age, albumin, LDH, weight_loss, CRP, NLR, Hb, Ki67, tumor size, ALP, Ca, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA, node, postmenopausal, sex), treatment_trastuzumab remains independently associated with pfs_months (signed effect).

Adjusting for prognostic features (ECOG, stage_iv, brain_mets, age, albumin, LDH, weight_loss, CRP, NLR, Hb, Ki67, tumor size, ALP, Ca, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA, node, postmenopausal, sex), treatment_olaparib remains independently associated with pfs_months (signed effect).

Adjusting for prognostic features (ECOG, stage_iv, brain_mets, age, albumin, LDH, weight_loss, CRP, NLR, Hb, Ki67, tumor size, ALP, Ca, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA, node, postmenopausal, sex), treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan remains independently associated with pfs_months (signed effect).

Adjusting for prognostic features (ECOG, stage_iv, brain_mets, age, albumin, LDH, weight_loss, CRP, NLR, Hb, Ki67, tumor size, ALP, Ca, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA, node, postmenopausal, sex), treatment_pembrolizumab remains independently associated with pfs_months (signed effect).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted effect of treatment_tamoxifen on pfs_months = -0.0027 months (p=0.827); model R^2 = 0.7481.
Adjusted effect of treatment_palbociclib on pfs_months = 1.1011 months (p=0); model R^2 = 0.7923.
Adjusted effect of treatment_trastuzumab on pfs_months = -0.0112 months (p=0.424); model R^2 = 0.7481.
Adjusted effect of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months = -0.0204 months (p=0.277); model R^2 = 0.7481.
Adjusted effect of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan on pfs_months = 0.0322 months (p=0.0852); model R^2 = 0.7481.
Adjusted effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months = -0.0233 months (p=0.137); model R^2 = 0.7481.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_tamoxifen prolongs pfs_months only in ER-positive (er_positive=1) patients; the er_positive × treatment_tamoxifen interaction is positive (treatment effect larger in ER+).
Among ER-positive patients, treatment_tamoxifen has a positive effect on pfs_months; among ER-negative patients, the effect is null or negative.
treatment_tamoxifen × pr_positive interaction: tamoxifen effect is larger when pr_positive=1.

analyses.result_summary: In ER+ (n=34886): tamoxifen effect = 0.0025 (p=0.885); In ER- (n=15114): tamoxifen effect = 0.0018 (p=0.581).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_trastuzumab × her2_positive interaction is positive: trastuzumab effect on pfs_months is larger in HER2-positive patients.
Among HER2-positive patients, treatment_trastuzumab has a positive effect on pfs_months; among HER2-negative patients, the effect is null or negative.
treatment_trastuzumab × her2_low interaction: trastuzumab is not expected to benefit HER2-low patients (interaction with her2_low ≈ 0).
treatment_olaparib × brca1_mutation interaction is positive: olaparib prolongs pfs_months selectively in BRCA1-mutated patients.
treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction is positive: olaparib prolongs pfs_months selectively in BRCA2-mutated patients.
Among patients carrying any BRCA1 or BRCA2 mutation, treatment_olaparib has a positive effect on pfs_months; among non-carriers the effect is null or negative.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ olaparib*brca_any + adj, then stratified
analyses.result_summary: Interaction olaparib:brca_any = 0.0443 (p=0.612). In BRCA1/2 carriers (n=2499): olaparib effect = 0.0237 (p=0.77); in non-carriers (n=47501): -0.0226 (p=0.242).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib × er_positive interaction is positive: palbociclib prolongs pfs_months preferentially in ER-positive (HR+) patients.
treatment_palbociclib × her2_positive interaction is negative: palbociclib has reduced or null effect in HER2-positive patients.
In ER-positive AND HER2-negative patients (i.e., HR+/HER2-), treatment_palbociclib has a positive effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Among HR+/HER2- (n=28589): palbociclib adjusted effect = 1.9145 months (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab × er_positive interaction: pembrolizumab effect is more favorable in ER-negative patients (negative interaction with er_positive).
treatment_pembrolizumab has a positive effect on pfs_months in triple-negative breast cancer (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan has a positive effect on pfs_months in triple-negative breast cancer.
Across all six treatments and 12 binary modifiers, at least one significant treatment×modifier interaction on pfs_months exists beyond the obvious receptor matches.

analyses.code: Loop OLS pfs ~ trt*feat + adj for trt in TRT_COLS, feat in 12 binary features
analyses.result_summary:
Top-8 smallest interaction p-values:
  treatment_palbociclib*er_positive: beta=+1.559 p=0
  treatment_palbociclib*pr_positive: beta=+1.029 p=0
  treatment_palbociclib*her2_positive: beta=-1.337 p=0
  treatment_palbociclib*pik3ca_mutation: beta=-1.665 p=0
  treatment_palbociclib*her2_low: beta=+0.382 p=5.18e-67
  treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan*has_brain_mets: beta=+0.193 p=0.00209
  treatment_palbociclib*brca2_mutation: beta=-0.159 p=0.0201
  treatment_palbociclib*sex_female: beta=+0.047 p=0.03

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment effects are blunted in patients with ecog_ps>=2: every treatment × ecog_ps interaction is non-positive (treatment effect smaller as ECOG rises).
treatment_palbociclib's PFS benefit shrinks or disappears in patients with ecog_ps==2.
treatment_trastuzumab benefit (the trastuzumab × her2_positive effect) is preserved even in patients with brain mets (no negative trastuzumab × has_brain_mets interaction restricted to HER2+).
treatment_olaparib benefit (in BRCA carriers) is attenuated by high LDH (negative olaparib × ldh_u_l interaction within BRCA carriers).
Among ER-positive AND HER2-negative AND ECOG<=1 patients, treatment_palbociclib produces a clear positive PFS effect.

analyses.result_summary: Among HR+/HER2- with ECOG<=1 (n=24342): palbociclib effect = +1.9234 (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: For each treatment, the patient subgroup with the largest adjusted PFS benefit is defined by 1-2 binary biomarkers that match canonical breast-cancer biology (e.g., olaparib in BRCA carriers, trastuzumab in HER2+, tamoxifen/palbociclib in ER+).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Greedy 3-feature conjunctions search recovers, for each treatment, a small subgroup definition where the adjusted PFS benefit is maximal — matching canonical biomarker-defined subgroups.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib produces a positive PFS effect specifically in patients carrying brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1; in non-carriers the adjusted effect is null.
treatment_trastuzumab produces a positive PFS effect in HER2-positive (her2_positive=1) patients only; in HER2-negative patients the effect is null or negative.
treatment_palbociclib produces a positive PFS effect specifically in ER-positive AND HER2-negative patients; in HER2-positive or ER-negative patients the effect is null or negative.
treatment_tamoxifen produces a positive PFS effect specifically in ER-positive patients; in ER-negative patients the effect is null or negative.
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan produces a positive PFS effect in ER-negative AND HER2-negative (i.e., TNBC-leaning) patients.
treatment_pembrolizumab produces a positive PFS effect in ER-negative AND HER2-negative (TNBC-leaning) patients; in ER-positive disease the effect is null or negative.

analyses.result_summary: olaparib in BRCA1/2-carriers vs non-carriers: subgroup effect = +0.0237 (p=0.77, n=2499); complement effect = -0.0226 (p=0.242, n=47501).
trastuzumab in HER2+ vs HER2-: subgroup effect = +0.0013 (p=0.81, n=9060); complement effect = -0.0126 (p=0.455, n=40940).
palbociclib in ER+/HER2- vs others: subgroup effect = +1.9145 (p=0, n=28589); complement effect = -0.0015 (p=0.594, n=21411).
tamoxifen in ER+ vs ER-: subgroup effect = +0.0025 (p=0.885, n=34886); complement effect = +0.0018 (p=0.581, n=15114).
sacituzumab in ER-/HER2- vs others: subgroup effect = +0.0030 (p=0.6, n=12351); complement effect = +0.0389 (p=0.11, n=37649).
pembrolizumab in ER-/HER2- vs others: subgroup effect = +0.0074 (p=0.124, n=12351); complement effect = -0.0430 (p=0.0342, n=37649).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a joint multivariable model that includes all six treatments and the canonical treatment-by-biomarker interactions, each canonical interaction is positive and significant: tamoxifen×er_positive, palbociclib×er_positive (with negative palbociclib×her2_positive), trastuzumab×her2_positive, olaparib×brca_any, sacituzumab×(er_neg & her2_neg), pembrolizumab×(er_neg & her2_neg).

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_olaparib increases pfs_months specifically in patients with brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1; in BRCA1/2 wild-type patients the adjusted effect is not positive.
FINAL: treatment_trastuzumab increases pfs_months specifically in her2_positive=1 patients; in her2_positive=0 the adjusted effect is not positive.

FINAL: treatment_palbociclib increases pfs_months specifically in ER-positive patients without HER2 amplification (er_positive=1 AND her2_positive=0); HER2-positivity suppresses any palbociclib benefit.
FINAL: treatment_tamoxifen increases pfs_months specifically in er_positive=1 patients; in er_positive=0 the adjusted effect is not positive.
FINAL: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan increases pfs_months specifically in ER-negative AND HER2-negative patients (er_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0); ER-positivity suppresses any benefit.
FINAL: treatment_pembrolizumab increases pfs_months specifically in ER-negative AND HER2-negative patients (er_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0); ER-positivity suppresses any benefit.
